8537	
8538	// ============================================================================
8539	// TIER 1: STAFF WALK-IN BOOKING (Batch 5 — Mobile First, tablet-optimized)
8540	// Terminal-tablet booking flow. Staff at Nasugbu can only book BAT-NAS sailings;
8541	// staff at Calatagan can only book BAT-CAL sailings. Cash and card-at-counter.
8542	// ============================================================================
8543	function StaffWalkinScreen({ setScreen, t = T.en, govHospitalBookings = [], setGovHospitalBookings = () => {} }) {
8544	  const [step, setStep] = useState(1); // 1: sailing+class, 2: passengers+seats, 3: payment, 4: receipt
8545	  const [selectedClass, setSelectedClass] = useState('aircon');
8546	  const [paxCount, setPaxCount] = useState(1);
8547	  const [passengers, setPassengers] = useState([
8548	    { name: '', age: '', sex: 'M', idType: 'National ID', idNumber: '', passengerType: 'Adult', seat: '', agency: '', designation: '', reasonForTravel: '' },
8549	  ]);
8550	  const [paymentMethod, setPaymentMethod] = useState('cash');
8551	  const [cashTendered, setCashTendered] = useState('');
8552	  const [bookingRef, setBookingRef] = useState('');
8553	  const [ticketNumbers, setTicketNumbers] = useState([]);
8554	  const [showPrintPreview, setShowPrintPreview] = useState(true);
8555	
8556	  // Staff session — terminal locked to Nasugbu Port
8557	  const staff = { name: 'Marisol Hidalgo', port: 'BAT-NAS', portName: 'Nasugbu Port' };
8558	
8559	  // Today's sailings from this port — manifest status determines availability.
8560	  // Each sailing carries a per-class `pools` object — see consumePool/buildPools.
8561	  // taken values seeded so all three classes have some headroom for the demo.
8562	  const sailings = [
8563	    { id: 's1', time: '06:00', vessel: 'MV Our Lady of St Therese', manifestDeclared: true, departed: true,
8564	      seats: { openair: 0, aircon: 0, vip: 0 },
8565	      pools: { openair: buildPools(80), aircon: buildPools(30), vip: buildPools(10) } },
8566	    { id: 's2', time: '11:30', vessel: 'MV Our Lady of St Therese', manifestDeclared: false, departed: false,
8567	      seats: { openair: 22, aircon: 14, vip: 4 }, status: 'Boarding now',
8568	      pools: {
8569	        openair: { regular: { capacity: 71, taken: 58 }, govHospital: { capacity: 5, taken: 1, pending: 1 }, seniorPwd: { capacity: 4, taken: 2 } },
8570	        aircon:  { regular: { capacity: 21, taken: 16 }, govHospital: { capacity: 5, taken: 0, pending: 0 }, seniorPwd: { capacity: 4, taken: 3 } },
8571	        vip:     { regular: { capacity: 1, taken: 1 },   govHospital: { capacity: 5, taken: 2, pending: 0 }, seniorPwd: { capacity: 4, taken: 1 } },
8572	      } },
8573	    { id: 's3', time: '16:00', vessel: 'MV Our Lady of St Therese', manifestDeclared: false, departed: false,
8574	      seats: { openair: 50, aircon: 30, vip: 10 }, status: 'Next sailing',
8575	      pools: {
8576	        openair: { regular: { capacity: 71, taken: 30 }, govHospital: { capacity: 5, taken: 0, pending: 1 }, seniorPwd: { capacity: 4, taken: 0 } },
8577	        aircon:  { regular: { capacity: 21, taken: 0 },  govHospital: { capacity: 5, taken: 0, pending: 0 }, seniorPwd: { capacity: 4, taken: 0 } },
8578	        vip:     { regular: { capacity: 1, taken: 0 },   govHospital: { capacity: 5, taken: 0, pending: 0 }, seniorPwd: { capacity: 4, taken: 0 } },
8579	      } },
8580	  ];
8581	
8582	  // Auto-select the first sailing that hasn't departed and whose manifest isn't declared
8583	  const activeSailing = sailings.find(s => !s.departed && !s.manifestDeclared);
8584	  const nextSailing = sailings.find(s => !s.departed && !s.manifestDeclared && s.id !== activeSailing?.id);
8585	  // Staff can only book for activeSailing. nextSailing is shown as locked until manifest is declared.
8586	
8587	  const fares = { openair: 350, aircon: 550, vip: 850 };
8588	  const subtotal = fares[selectedClass] * paxCount;
8589	  const change = paymentMethod === 'cash' && cashTendered ? Math.max(0, Number(cashTendered) - subtotal) : 0;
8590	
8591	  // Seat grids per class
8592	  const seatGrid = selectedClass === 'openair'
8593	    ? { rows: 10, cols: 8, prefix: 'O', colLabels: 'ABCDEFGH'.split('') }
8594	    : selectedClass === 'aircon'
8595	    ? { rows: 10, cols: 5, prefix: 'A', colLabels: 'ABCDE'.split('') }
8596	    : { rows: 3, cols: 4, prefix: 'V', colLabels: 'ABCD'.split('') };
8597	
8598	  // Mock taken seats (pseudo-random based on class)
8599	  const takenSeats = new Set();
8600	  const seed = selectedClass === 'openair' ? 3 : selectedClass === 'aircon' ? 7 : 2;
8601	  for (let r = 1; r <= seatGrid.rows; r++) {
8602	    for (let c = 0; c < seatGrid.cols; c++) {
8603	      if ((r * (c + 1) * seed) % 5 === 0) {
8604	        takenSeats.add(`${seatGrid.prefix}${String(r).padStart(2, '0')}-${seatGrid.colLabels[c]}`);
8605	      }
8606	    }
8607	  }
8608	
8609	  const updatePaxCount = (n) => {
8610	    setPaxCount(n);
8611	    const newPax = [];
8612	    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
8613	      newPax.push(passengers[i] || { name: '', age: '', sex: 'M', idType: 'National ID', idNumber: '', passengerType: 'Adult', seat: '', agency: '', designation: '', reasonForTravel: '' });
8614	    }
8615	    setPassengers(newPax);
8616	  };
8617	
8618	  const updatePassenger = (i, field, value) => {
8619	    const newPax = [...passengers];
8620	    newPax[i] = { ...newPax[i], [field]: value };
8621	    setPassengers(newPax);
8622	  };
8623	
8624	  const assignSeat = (i, seatId) => {
8625	    // Unassign if clicking already-assigned seat for this passenger
8626	    if (passengers[i].seat === seatId) {
8627	      updatePassenger(i, 'seat', '');
8628	      return;
8629	    }
8630	    // Don't allow if taken by another passenger in this booking
8631	    const takenByOther = passengers.some((p, j) => j !== i && p.seat === seatId);
8632	    if (takenByOther || takenSeats.has(seatId)) return;
8633	    updatePassenger(i, 'seat', seatId);
8634	  };
8635	
8636	  const [assigningPaxIndex, setAssigningPaxIndex] = useState(0);
8637	
8638	  const handleConfirm = () => {
8639	    const refDate = '0519';
8640	    const refRand = Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 6).toUpperCase();
8641	    setBookingRef(`BR-2026-${refDate}-${refRand}`);
8642	    const tickets = passengers.map(() => {
8643	      const tRand = Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 6).toUpperCase();
8644	      return `BTN-2026-${refDate}-${tRand}`;
8645	    });
8646	    setTicketNumbers(tickets);
8647	    setStep(4);
8648	  };
8649	
8650	  const reset = () => {
8651	    setStep(1);
8652	    setPaxCount(1);
8653	    setPassengers([{ name: '', age: '', sex: 'M', idType: 'National ID', idNumber: '', passengerType: 'Adult', seat: '', agency: '', designation: '', reasonForTravel: '' }]);
8654	    setCashTendered('');
8655	    setBookingRef('');
8656	    setTicketNumbers([]);
8657	    setAssigningPaxIndex(0);
8658	  };
8659	
8660	  return (
8661	    <div>
8662	      <MobileBadge strategy="Mobile First" />
8663	
8664	      {/* POS header bar */}
8665	      <div className="rounded-xl p-3 mb-3 flex items-center justify-between gap-2" style={{ background: COLORS.ink, color: 'white' }}>
8666	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
8667	          <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold" style={{ background: COLORS.primary }}>MH</div>
8668	          <div>
8669	            <div className="text-xs font-semibold">{staff.name}</div>
8670	            <div className="text-[10px] opacity-70 flex items-center gap-1">
8671	              <Lock size={9} /> {staff.port} · {staff.portName}
8672	            </div>
8673	          </div>
8674	        </div>
8675	        <div className="text-right">
8676	          <div className="text-[10px] opacity-70">{t.walkInTitle}</div>
8677	          <div className="text-xs font-mono">May 19, 2026 · 14:32</div>
8678	        </div>
8679	      </div>
8680	
8681	      {/* Active sailing — locked, no date selection */}
8682	      {activeSailing && (
8683	        <div className="rounded-xl p-3 mb-3 border-2" style={{ background: '#FFE5E9', borderColor: COLORS.primary }}>
8684	          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
8685	            <div className="text-xs font-bold uppercase" style={{ color: COLORS.primary }}>
8686	              Active Sailing — booking locked to this departure
8687	            </div>
8688	            <span className="text-[10px] px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold" style={{ background: '#DCFCE7', color: '#166534' }}>
8689	              {activeSailing.status}
8690	            </span>
8691	          </div>
8692	          <div className="flex items-baseline gap-2">
8693	            <span className="text-xl font-bold" style={{ color: COLORS.ink }}>{activeSailing.time}</span>
8694	            <ArrowRight size={14} style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }} />
8695	            <span className="text-sm font-mono" style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>MIN-TIL</span>
8696	          </div>
8697	          <div className="text-xs" style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>{activeSailing.vessel} · Today</div>
8698	          <div className="flex gap-1.5 mt-1.5">
8699	            <span className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: '#DBEAFE', color: '#1E40AF' }}>OA {activeSailing.seats.openair}</span>
8700	            <span className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: '#FFE5E9', color: COLORS.primary }}>AC {activeSailing.seats.aircon}</span>
8701	            <span className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: '#FEF3C7', color: '#A16207' }}>VIP {activeSailing.seats.vip}</span>
8702	          </div>
8703	        </div>
8704	      )}
8705	
8706	      {/* Departed/declared sailings — info only */}
8707	      {sailings.filter(s => s.departed || s.manifestDeclared).length > 0 && (
8708	        <div className="rounded-lg p-2 mb-3 text-[10px]" style={{ background: COLORS.bgMuted, color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>
8709	          {sailings.filter(s => s.departed).map(s => (
8710	            <div key={s.id} className="flex items-center gap-1">
8711	              <span>⛴️ {s.time} — Departed · manifest declared ✓</span>
8712	            </div>
8713	          ))}
8714	          {nextSailing && (
8715	            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-1" style={{ color: COLORS.ink }}>
8716	              <Clock size={10} />
8717	              <span>Next: {nextSailing.time} — available after {activeSailing?.time} manifest is declared</span>
8718	            </div>
8719	          )}
8720	        </div>
8721	      )}
8722	
8723	      {/* Step indicator */}
8724	      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-4 overflow-x-auto pb-1">
8725	        {[
8726	          { n: 1, label: 'Class' },
8727	          { n: 2, label: 'Passengers' },
8728	          { n: 3, label: 'Payment' },
8729	          { n: 4, label: 'Receipt' },
8730	        ].map((s, i) => (
8731	          <div key={s.n} className="flex items-center gap-1.5 flex-shrink-0">
8732	            <div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-[10px] font-bold"
8733	              style={{ background: step >= s.n ? COLORS.primary : COLORS.bgMuted, color: step >= s.n ? 'white' : COLORS.inkMuted }}>
8734	              {step > s.n ? <Check size={12} /> : s.n}
8735	            </div>
8736	            <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold" style={{ color: step >= s.n ? COLORS.ink : COLORS.inkMuted }}>{s.label}</span>
8737	            {i < 3 && <ChevronRight size={12} style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }} />}
8738	          </div>
8739	        ))}
8740	      </div>
8741	
8742	      {/* STEP 1 — Class + pax count */}
8743	      {step === 1 && (
8744	        <>
8745	          <h2 className="text-lg font-bold mb-1" style={{ color: COLORS.ink }}>Select class</h2>
8746	          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 mb-4">
8747	            {[
8748	              { id: 'openair', name: 'Open Air', color: '#1E40AF', bg: '#DBEAFE', fare: 350 },
8749	              { id: 'aircon', name: 'Aircon', color: COLORS.primary, bg: '#FFE5E9', fare: 550 },
8750	              { id: 'vip', name: 'VIP', color: '#A16207', bg: '#FEF3C7', fare: 850 },

8752	              <button key={c.id} onClick={() => setSelectedClass(c.id)}
8753	                className="rounded-xl p-2.5 border-2 text-center"
8754	                style={{ background: c.bg, borderColor: selectedClass === c.id ? c.color : 'transparent' }}>
8755	                <div className="text-[10px] font-semibold" style={{ color: c.color }}>{c.name}</div>
8756	                <div className="text-base font-bold font-mono" style={{ color: c.color }}>₱{c.fare}</div>
8757	              </button>
8758	            ))}
8759	          </div>
8760	
8761	          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold mb-2" style={{ color: COLORS.ink }}>How many passengers?</h3>
8762	          <div className="rounded-xl p-3 mb-4 bg-white border flex items-center justify-between" style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border }}>
8763	            <button onClick={() => updatePaxCount(Math.max(1, paxCount - 1))}
8764	              className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full text-xl font-bold border" style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border, color: COLORS.ink }}>−</button>

8805	                  )}
8806	                </div>
8807	                <input type="text" value={p.name} onChange={(e) => updatePassenger(i, 'name', e.target.value)}
8808	                  placeholder="Full name (as on ID)"
8809	                  className="w-full h-9 px-2.5 rounded-lg border outline-none text-xs mb-1.5"
8810	                  style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border, color: COLORS.ink }} />
8811	                <div className="flex gap-1.5 mb-1.5">
8812	                  <input type="number" value={p.age} onChange={(e) => updatePassenger(i, 'age', e.target.value)}
8813	                    placeholder="Age" className="w-14 h-9 px-2 rounded-lg border outline-none text-xs"
8814	                    style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border, color: COLORS.ink }} />
8815	                  <select value={p.sex} onChange={(e) => updatePassenger(i, 'sex', e.target.value)}
8816	                    className="w-14 h-9 px-1 rounded-lg border outline-none text-xs bg-white"
8817	                    style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border, color: COLORS.ink }}>
8818	                    <option value="M">M</option><option value="F">F</option>
8819	                  </select>
8820	                  <select value={p.passengerType} onChange={(e) => updatePassenger(i, 'passengerType', e.target.value)}
8821	                    className="flex-1 h-9 px-2 rounded-lg border outline-none text-xs bg-white"
8822	                    style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border, color: COLORS.ink }}>
8823	                    <option>Adult</option><option>Senior (20%)</option><option>PWD (20%)</option>
8824	                    <option>Student (20%)</option><option>Child 3-12 (50%)</option><option>Infant 0-3 (free)</option>
8825	                    <option>{PASSENGER_TYPE_GOV_HOSPITAL}</option>
8826	                  </select>
8827	                </div>
8828	                <div className="flex gap-1.5">
8829	                  <select value={p.idType} onChange={(e) => updatePassenger(i, 'idType', e.target.value)}
8830	                    className="flex-1 h-9 px-2 rounded-lg border outline-none text-xs bg-white"
8831	                    style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border, color: COLORS.ink }}>
8832	                    <option>National ID</option><option>Driver License</option><option>UMID</option><option>SSS</option>
8833	                    <option>PhilHealth</option><option>Passport</option><option>Senior ID</option><option>PWD ID</option>
8834	                    <option>Student ID</option><option>PSA Birth Cert</option>
8835	                    <option>Government ID</option><option>Hospital Worker ID</option>
8836	                    <option>PRC License</option><option>DOH Issued ID</option>
8837	                  </select>
8838	                  <input type="text" value={p.idNumber} onChange={(e) => updatePassenger(i, 'idNumber', e.target.value)}
8839	                    placeholder="ID number" className="flex-1 h-9 px-2 rounded-lg border outline-none text-xs font-mono"
8840	                    style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border, color: COLORS.ink }} />
8841	                </div>
8842	                {p.passengerType === PASSENGER_TYPE_GOV_HOSPITAL && (
8843	                  <div className="mt-2 p-2 rounded-lg border" style={{ background: '#FAF5FF', borderColor: '#E9D5FF' }}>
8844	                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-2">
8845	                      <ReservedPoolBadge pool="govHospital" />
8846	                      <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold" style={{ color: '#5B21B6' }}>Walk-in only · requires admin approval</span>
8847	                    </div>
8848	                    <div className="flex gap-1.5 mb-1.5">
8849	                      <input type="text" value={p.agency} onChange={(e) => updatePassenger(i, 'agency', e.target.value)}
8850	                        placeholder="Agency / Hospital name" className="flex-1 h-9 px-2 rounded-lg border outline-none text-xs"
8851	                        style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border, color: COLORS.ink }} />
8852	                      <input type="text" value={p.designation} onChange={(e) => updatePassenger(i, 'designation', e.target.value)}
8853	                        placeholder="Designation" className="flex-1 h-9 px-2 rounded-lg border outline-none text-xs"
8854	                        style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border, color: COLORS.ink }} />
8855	                    </div>
8856	                    <input type="text" value={p.reasonForTravel} onChange={(e) => updatePassenger(i, 'reasonForTravel', e.target.value)}
8857	                      placeholder="Reason for travel (surfaces to admin approver)" className="w-full h-9 px-2 rounded-lg border outline-none text-xs"
8858	                      style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border, color: COLORS.ink }} />
8859	                  </div>
8860	                )}
8861	              </div>
8862	            ))}
8863	          </div>
8864	
8865	          {/* Inline seat map */}
8866	          <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-3 border mb-4" style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border }}>
8867	            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
8868	              <div className="text-xs font-bold" style={{ color: COLORS.ink }}>
8869	                Seat map — {selectedClass === 'openair' ? 'Open Air' : selectedClass === 'aircon' ? 'Aircon' : 'VIP'}
8870	              </div>
8871	              <div className="text-[10px]" style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>
8872	                Assigning for: <span className="font-semibold" style={{ color: COLORS.primary }}>Pax {assigningPaxIndex + 1}</span>
8873	              </div>
8874	            </div>
8875	            <div className="flex gap-2 mb-2 text-[9px]" style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>
8876	              <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><span className="w-3 h-3 rounded border" style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border }}></span>Free</span>
8877	              <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><span className="w-3 h-3 rounded" style={{ background: COLORS.primary }}></span>Your pick</span>
8878	              <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><span className="w-3 h-3 rounded" style={{ background: '#E5E7EB' }}></span>Taken</span>
8879	            </div>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-29 22:43:16Z)**_

This file is `docs/vercel_mockup/src/MOCKUP.jsx` — a static Vercel UI mockup. The diff adds three new React state fields (`agency`, `designation`, `reasonForTravel`) on a passenger object, a new `<option>` in two `<select>`s, and a conditional block of `<input type="text">` controls bound via `onChange`/value to component state.

Tracing the new tainted values:
- `p.agency`, `p.designation`, `p.reasonForTravel` are read only via JSX `value={...}` props (React auto-escapes) — no `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`, no `eval`, no template/URL/exec sink.
- `updatePassenger` writes them back into the `passengers` array via `useState`. Nothing in the surrounding `StaffWalkinScreen` forwards these strings to a network/IO/shell/SQL sink — `handleConfirm` only sets a local random booking ref and ticket numbers.
- The newly-added `govHospitalBookings`/`setGovHospitalBookings` props default to `[]` / no-op and are not consumed within the changed function body. No mutation, no persistence.
- The new `<option>` values are constants (`PASSENGER_TYPE_GOV_HOSPITAL` and string literals like `"Government ID"`) — no attacker-controlled string is rendered into HTML attributes.
- This file is a UI mockup; there is no authorization/policy logic in this change to bypass, no parser, no IPC, no logging sink touched.

No source→sink path with security impact is introduced by the diff.
